sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33088" key="e)ktropi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτροπ-ίας</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶνος</foreign> <sense id="n33088.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turned</tr_> (i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sour</tr_>) wine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.20</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:248" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.248</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
